fields.name: Table No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the table this field belongs to.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field.

fields.name: Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the field, that is, the name that will be shown in the user interface.

fields.name: Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number that uniquely identifies this field within its table.

fields.name: IsRuntime
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the field is a runtime field. Runtime fields are created on the fly and do not exist in the database schema.
